themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "And a clean person shall take hyssop, and dip it in the water, and sprinkle it upon the tent,...". Word-study detail reinforces "יִטְהָֽר׃: he shall be clean - to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterated; levitically,...".

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.
